title: Long-save stability and migration gate
summary: Validate long-save stability, migration policy and save/replay evidence for 1.0 without making owner-gated public save commitments.
acceptance: Defines and validates M8 long-save/migration gate
Adds focused save/replay or migration evidence for M8 scenarios
Keeps public save compatibility and Windows/Web interoperability owner-gated unless separately approved
Protects existing save/replay and command replay evidence
Does not add broad Electron filesystem APIs

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

forbiddenPaths: broad Electron filesystem or shell APIs
